query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM translations WHERE entityType = 'tour';
SELECT targetLanguage, COUNT(DISTINCT entityId) as tour_count, COUNT(*) as field_count FROM translations WHERE entityType = 'tour' GROUP BY targetLanguage;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM translations WHERE entityType = 'tour';
SELECT targetLanguage, COUNT(DISTINCT entityId) as tour_count, COUNT(*) as field_count FROM translations WHERE entityType = 'tour' GROUP BY targetLanguage;
